news.title: Kuniko chases bonanza silver repeats in NSW with new drilling
news.snippet: Kuniko is set to drill again at its Commonwealth gold-silver project in NSW, chasing extensions to a bonanza discovery and other high-grade hits from its first campaign.

news.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX blockbuster gets a market reality check
news.snippet: SpaceX shares have tumbled amid growing concern that the AI boom won’t deliver the returns investors had priced into the sector.

news.title: Larvotto digs in as Hammer takeover battle heats up
news.snippet: Larvotto Resources has fired back at Austral’s rival Hammer bid, saying its own bid offers more certainty through Hillgrove’s looming cash flow, antimony exposure and financial clout.

news.title: Proteomics bags US patent for endometriosis test
news.snippet: Proteomics International Laboratories has won a US patent for its endometriosis test, advancing plans to roll out the diagnostic product in the world’s biggest healthcare market.

news.title: Seasoned Mt Isa geo joins True North to boost Qld copper search
news.snippet: True North Copper has boosted its exploration firepower with the appointment of Mt Isa region veteran Matt Porter, as drilling continues at its Aquila copper discovery in Queensland.

news.title: Patriot nails high-grade copper-silver find beside Zambian giant
news.snippet: Patriot Resources has hit high-grade copper from surface in maiden drilling at its Tonic prospect in Zambia, including 2.56 per cent copper and 62.3g/t silver.

news.title: Telstra has broken a critical rule of corporate crisis management
news.snippet: The telco giant has let itself down in how transparent it was about the full impact of Wednesday’s outage.
